name: trialBalance
_note: accounting.trialBalance is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/accounting.js, registerLensAction('accounting','trialBalance',...)), NOT a runMacro/MACROS macro — reached only via /api/lens/accounting/:id/run + /api/lens/run, dispatched on the EXACT key 'accounting.trialBalance' (3-arg handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input) with virtualArtifact.data === input). The /lenses/accounting page drives it through useRunArtifact('accounting'). DETERMINISTIC pure compute (no LLM, no network). POISON: debit/credit are coerced via finNum — non-finite (Infinity/NaN from 'Infinity'/'1e999') OR beyond-1e15 magnitude collapse to 0, so every total stays FINITE (the *100 cents-rounding can never overflow). Empty/absent/non-array accounts degrade graceful (ok:true zero totals, or a caught handler_error), never throws. Because it lives in LENS_ACTIONS (not MACROS), the macro-assassin's enumerateMacros(MACROS) pipeline does NOT drive this contract — it is an authored behavioral spec pinned by server/tests/accounting-lens-macros.test.js.
